name: XState Reachability Checked
description: All states in an XState machine should be reachable from the initial state. Unreachable states indicate dead code or design errors.
rationale: Unreachable states waste code and confuse developers. Region decomposition reveals which states are actually reachable and what conditions lead to them.

examples.passes: Decompose(authMachine) → all states appear in at least one region
examples.fails: State 'adminOverride' exists in the machine but no event sequence reaches it
